general.title: General Discussion
general.description: Talk about Region Zero, weapons, perks, strategies, and gameplay.

threads.title: Favorite Weapon So Far?
threads.preview: Which Region Zero weapon feels the best to use?
threads.author: RegionZeroDev

posts.author: RegionZeroDev
posts.content: Curious what everyone's favorite weapon has been so far. ARC-3? MG42? VX-11?

posts.author: Player123
posts.content: ARC-3 feels the most unique. The electric effect makes it feel different from normal guns.

posts.author: ZombieSlayer
posts.content: MG42 is my favorite because the shell ejection makes it feel powerful.

threads.title: Hardest Region?
threads.preview: Which area gives you the most trouble?
threads.author: Player123

posts.author: Player123
posts.content: Viral Research feels like the hardest region so far. The layout gets intense fast.

posts.author: RegionZeroDev
posts.content: That is good to know. Viral Research is supposed to feel like a major difficulty jump.

posts.author: ZombieSlayer
posts.content: Freezer gets rough too if Frostbite does not trigger at the right time.

posts.author: Tester01
posts.content: Redline plus Frostbite feels insane when the horde gets dense.

posts.author: RegionZeroDev
posts.content: That combo probably needs testing because Redline can make some weapons melt ammo.

posts.author: Player123
posts.content: Slick Shells with MG42 would be hilarious if the floor gets covered fast enough.

bugs.title: Bug Reports
bugs.description: Report crashes, glitches, AI issues, broken rooms, and launcher problems.

threads.title: Zombies Getting Stuck Near Freezer Doors
threads.preview: Pathfinding issue after the latest room generation update.
threads.author: Tester01

posts.author: Tester01
posts.content: Zombies sometimes get stuck near freezer doors after the latest procedural update.

posts.author: RegionZeroDev
posts.content: Good catch. I'll check the nav bounds around those doorway prefabs.

threads.title: ARC-3 Audio Sometimes Cuts Out
threads.preview: Happens when too many enemies are hit at once.
threads.author: Player123

posts.author: Player123
posts.content: When the ARC-3 hits a big group, the sound sometimes cuts out.

posts.author: RegionZeroDev
posts.content: That may be caused by too many overlapping audio sources. I can add an audio cap.

threads.title: Mystery Box Preview Rotation Issue
threads.preview: Weapon preview does not always match the box direction.
threads.author: BugHunter

posts.author: BugHunter
posts.content: The mystery box rotates, but sometimes the preview weapon still faces the old direction.

posts.author: RegionZeroDev
posts.content: That sounds like the preview child object is not inheriting rotation correctly.

suggestions.title: Feature Suggestions
suggestions.description: Suggest weapons, perks, regions, enemies, mechanics, and future content.

threads.title: Bump Stock Perk
threads.preview: Turn semi-auto weapons into full-auto weapons.
threads.author: ZombieSlayer

posts.author: ZombieSlayer
posts.content: A perk that turns semi-auto weapons into full-auto would be awesome.

posts.author: RegionZeroDev
posts.content: That could work as a fire mode modifier. It would need recoil and audio limits.

posts.author: Player123
posts.content: It would make pistols way more fun late game.

threads.title: Slick Shells Upgrade
threads.preview: Spent casings make zombies slip when enough pile up.
threads.author: Tester01

posts.author: Tester01
posts.content: Shell casings should make zombies slip after enough of them pile up.

posts.author: RegionZeroDev
posts.content: That idea is actually really funny. It could only count casings from players with the perk.

posts.author: BugHunter
posts.content: Performance might be okay if each casing only counts once after it stops moving.

threads.title: New Region Idea: Biohazard Quarantine
threads.preview: A sealed containment wing with mutated enemy variants.
threads.author: Player123

posts.author: Player123
posts.content: A quarantine region with sealed rooms and stronger infected variants would fit the game.

posts.author: RegionZeroDev
posts.content: That could be a good bridge between Viral Research and Region Zero.

patches.title: Patch Discussion
patches.description: Discuss recent updates, balance changes, bug fixes, and upcoming content.

threads.title: Version 0.3.4 Feedback
threads.preview: Share thoughts on the latest Frostbite polish update.
threads.author: RegionZeroDev

posts.author: RegionZeroDev
posts.content: Version 0.3.4 adds more polish to Frostbite. Let me know if the effects feel satisfying.

posts.author: Player123
posts.content: The new sound makes it feel way more impactful.

threads.title: Redline Balance Discussion
threads.preview: Is the fire rate boost too strong on MG42 and PPSH?
threads.author: Tester01

posts.author: Tester01
posts.content: Redline feels insane on MG42 and PPSH. It burns ammo extremely fast.

posts.author: RegionZeroDev
posts.content: That is expected, but the recoil and audio need to stay controlled.

posts.author: ZombieSlayer
posts.content: It feels powerful but risky. I like that it evaporates ammo.

threads.title: Procedural Region Generation Feedback
threads.preview: Discuss region distance, room flow, and door placement.
threads.author: BugHunter

posts.author: BugHunter
posts.content: Some regions feel like they spawn too close together. The transitions could use more spacing.

posts.author: RegionZeroDev
posts.content: The generator should place major regions farther out. I can tune the origin distance ranges.
